targets.expr: ((zendesk_tickets_total_new + zendesk_tickets_total_open + zendesk_tickets_total_pending + zendesk_tickets_total_hold) - zendesk_unassigned_tickets_total) / (zendesk_tickets_total_new + zendesk_tickets_total_open + zendesk_tickets_total_pending + zendesk_tickets_total_hold) * 100

panels.description: Solved minus Created. Positive = backlog shrinking, Negative = backlog growing.
